arts.ttl: Italy to honour Gigi Riva with special pre-match tribute against France
arts.sum: The Italian national team is set to pay a heartfelt tribute to the legendary Gigi Riva before their Nations League match against France at San Siro. Riva, who passed away in January, would have celebrated his 80th birthday on November 7th. Sky Sport Italia report that the Italian Football Federation (FIGC) has planned a special commemoration for the man known as ‘Rombo di Tuono’ (Rumble of Thunder). As part of the pre-match festivities, a video showcasing some of Riva’s most memorable goals will be displayed on San Siro’s giant screens. arts.sum: Italy aim to conclude their impressive Nations League group campaign when France arrive in Milan this evening. arts.ttl: Nations League | Italy v France: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: The final standings of Italy’s group in the Nations League A will be decided at San Siro as the Azzurri host France with more than one favorable outcome available to them. Luciano Spalletti’s men only need to avoid losing by more than two goals to secure the top spot. Even if the match ends with a two-goal victory for France (0-2, 1-3, 2-4, etc.), Italy would still come out on top due to their superior goal difference, having won 3-1 in the away fixture in Paris.
